chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Appln No.S-238 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection at flag-A. 2. For orders on CMA No.1572/2025. 3. For hearing of bail application. 03.07.2025 Mr. Khalil Ahmed Matilo, Addl: Prosecutor General...-..-...-..-..-..-..-..- None present for the applicant and same was the case on 26.05.2025 as none appeared on behalf of applicant and again today neither, they are in attendance nor their counsel. Notices were repeated I.O present in Court today he has submitted that none from the applicant appeared before him to record the statement, in the circumstances earlier order is recalled and bail is dismissed. JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
